---
title: "Table S1: Daily N₂O Flux Summary Statistics"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
    toc: false
  docx:
    reference-doc: default
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(readxl)
library(gt)
```

```{r load-data}
flux_data <- read_csv("data/cleaned_flux_data.csv") |>
  mutate(date = as.Date(date))
```

```{r table-s1}
# Determine whether a raw (pre-zero-clamped) flux column exists.
# 'gnha_day_no_negative' clamps negatives to 0; 'gnha_day' (if present)
# retains the original measured value including negative (uptake) fluxes.
raw_col <- if ("gnha_day" %in% names(flux_data)) "gnha_day" else "gnha_day_no_negative"

table_s1_data <- flux_data |>
  filter(treatment %in% c("Sorghum", "Sorghum + Rye", "Corn", "Soy")) |>
  mutate(
    Treatment = case_when(
      treatment == "Corn"          ~ "Maize",
      treatment == "Soy"           ~ "Soybean",
      treatment == "Sorghum + Rye" ~ "Sorghum + WCC",
      TRUE                         ~ treatment
    ),
    Treatment = factor(Treatment,
                       levels = c("Maize", "Soybean", "Sorghum", "Sorghum + WCC")),
    year      = year(date),
    raw_flux  = .data[[raw_col]]
  ) |>
  filter(year %in% c(2023, 2024)) |>

  # Pool row & interrow to plot-level daily means
  group_by(date, plot, Treatment, year) |>
  summarise(
    plot_flux     = mean(gnha_day_no_negative, na.rm = TRUE),
    plot_flux_raw = mean(raw_flux,             na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>

  # Summary statistics per Treatment × Year
  group_by(year, Treatment) |>
  summarise(
    n        = sum(!is.na(plot_flux)),
    mean_sd  = sprintf("%d (%d)",
                       round(mean(plot_flux,     na.rm = TRUE)),
                       round(sd(plot_flux,       na.rm = TRUE))),
    minimum  = round(min(plot_flux_raw,          na.rm = TRUE)),   # includes negatives
    q25      = round(quantile(plot_flux, 0.25,   na.rm = TRUE)),
    median   = round(median(plot_flux,           na.rm = TRUE)),
    q75      = round(quantile(plot_flux, 0.75,   na.rm = TRUE)),
    maximum  = round(max(plot_flux,              na.rm = TRUE)),
    .groups  = "drop"
  )

# Publication-ready table
gt_s1 <- table_s1_data |>
  gt(groupname_col = "year", rowname_col = "Treatment") |>
  tab_header(
    title    = md("**Table S1.** Summary statistics of daily nitrous oxide (N₂O) fluxes grouped by year and treatment"),
    subtitle = md("Values in g N₂O-N ha⁻¹ d⁻¹. Mean and standard deviation rounded to nearest whole number. Minimum includes negative (net uptake) flux values.")
  ) |>
  cols_label(
    n       = "Sample Number",
    mean_sd = md("Mean (Std. Dev.)"),
    minimum = md("Minimum"),
    q25     = md("25^th^ Quantile"),
    median  = "Median",
    q75     = md("75^th^ Quantile"),
    maximum = "Maximum"
  ) |>
  cols_align(align = "center", columns = -Treatment) |>
  cols_align(align = "left",   columns = Treatment)  |>
  tab_style(
    style    = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_row_groups()
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style    = cell_borders(sides = "top", color = "black", weight = px(2)),
    locations = cells_row_groups()
  ) |>
  tab_options(
    table.font.names        = "Times New Roman",
    table.font.size         = 11,
    column_labels.font.weight = "bold",
    row_group.font.weight   = "bold",
    heading.align           = "left",
    table.border.top.style  = "solid",
    table.border.top.width  = px(2),
    table.border.bottom.style = "solid",
    table.border.bottom.width = px(2)
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote  = md("† Sorghum + WCC = Sorghum with Winter Cover Crop (cereal rye). Maize and Soybean are the reference grain crops in the rotation."),
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = Treatment)
  )

gt_s1
```

```{r save}
# Save as RTF (opens cleanly in Word) and PNG
gtsave(gt_s1, "SubmissionFiguresTables/Table_S1_Daily_Flux_Statistics.rtf")
gtsave(gt_s1, "SubmissionFiguresTables/Table_S1_Daily_Flux_Statistics.png",
       expand = 10)
```
